title: ACCOUNTING AND FOREIGN EXPERIENCE IN THE FIELD OF TOURISM
author: Khalilov Bakhromjon Bakhodirovich
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This article deals with accounting in the field of tourism, the activities of travel companies, the procedure for making calculations between the tour operator and its agent, the documents drawn up by travel agencies, their composition, the peculiarities of keeping documents, the tax liability of travel agencies. lashing procedure, the procedure of tax legislation applied to the tour operator, analytical data on foreign experience in accounting in tourist companies are given.
steps_raw: This article deals with accounting in the field of tourism, the activities of travel companies, the procedure for making calculations between the tour operator and its agent, the documents drawn up by travel agencies, their composition, the peculiarities of keeping documents, the tax liability of travel agencies. lashing procedure, the procedure of tax legislation applied to the tour operator, analytical data on foreign experience in accounting in tourist companies are given.
